pom.xml.general_idea: Change the target Java compiler release version from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; without this change, the code would compile for JDK 17, potentially missing JDK 21 features or failing if JDK 21-specific APIs are used without the correct target setting.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Update the base Docker image from UBI8/OpenJDK 17 to UBI9/OpenJDK 21 to align with the target JDK version.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.why_exists: The application is migrated to JDK 21; running on a JDK 17 base image would result in a version mismatch and potential runtime incompatibilities with JDK 21-specific features or bytecode.
